notes: Structured from existing markdown unit card.
This is currently assigned to the 4th grade Unit 2 pocket because the local 4th grade file set does not include Treasure Island yet.

book.title: The Three Musketeers
book.author: Alexandre Dumas
book.description: Author: Alexandre Dumas Grade Level: 4th Grade (Ages 9-10) Unit Length: 30 lessons (24 regular + 6 assessments) Days: 31-60 (Weeks 7-12) - UNIT 2 Theme: Friendship, Loyalty, Courage, Adventure Reading Level: Classic adventure, age-appropriate adaptation

weeks.title: Week 7: Meeting the Musketeers (Days 31-35)
reading: Chapters 1-4: The Boy from Gascony, Trouble in Meung, Three Duels Before Noon, All for One
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 8: The Adventure Begins (Days 36-40)
reading: Chapters 5-8: The Three Musketeers, The Captain's Blessing, The Queen's Secret, The Cardinal's Plot
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 9: The Mission (Days 41-45)
reading: Chapters 9-12: The Mission, D'Artagnan Alone, The Race to Paris, The Ball
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 10: Secrets Revealed (Days 46-50)
reading: Chapters 13-16: The Woman in the Shadows, Athos's Secret, The Siege of La Rochelle, The Breakfast in the Bastion
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 11: Milady's Plot (Days 51-55)
reading: Chapters 17-20: Milady's Mission, The Prisoner, The Warning, Too Late
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 12: Justice and Victory (Days 56-60)
reading: Chapters 21-24: The Trial of Milady, The Cardinal's Offer, One for All, All for One
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.
